title: British Museum suffers another embarrassing theft as ancient African gold disc is stolen by screwdriver-wielding thief before it is sold at Sothebys
description: The scandal has been exposed by historian Barnaby Phillips who says that he was tipped off about the case by an informed source.

title: The power and perils of blurring an ancient and modern day Purim
description: What do we risk when we draw these connections too tightly?The post The power and perils of blurring an ancient and modern day Purim appeared first on The Canadian Jewish News.

title: Africa: Colonialism in Africa - Archaeology Offers a Deeper View
description: [The Conversation Africa] Colonialism has been a central part of history around the world, differing only in form over time and space. After all, whenever people have moved from one place to another, they have colonised spaces and other people or forms of life.

title: Lapid: Criticism of Israel often masks 'very ancient' antisemitism
description: Speaking to CNN, opposition leader says some criticism of Israel is legitimate but warns antisemitism and a “weird coalition of the far right and the far left" are fueling attacks on the US-Israel alliance.

title: Renewables And Fossil Fuels In Times Of War
description: The US/Israel war against Iran is upending energy and financial markets. The escalating attacks have reignited a longstanding debate: Is the combination of renewables and fossil fuels pragmatic as a broad national energy mix, or is it, more clearly, a threat to national security? Last fall, President Xi Jinping announced ... [continued]The post Renewables And Fossil Fuels In Times Of War appeared first on CleanTechnica.
